message:
feat: integrate Flintlock for VM management

Add TaskManager to coordinate VM lifecycle with Flintlock:
- Create tasks.go with TaskManager that handles VM creation,
  ZFS dataset provisioning, cloud-init generation, and secret
  injection
- Add parseMemory helper to convert memory strings (e.g., "2g")
  to megabytes
- Update daemon.go with TaskManager field and accessor methods
- Implement CreateTask gRPC handler to use TaskManager

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
